benefits.description: HGH Fragment 176-191 and AOD-9604 are specific lipolytic agents that trigger triglyceride breakdown
Tesamorelin provides abdominal-specific fat loss in lean individuals via endogenous GH stimulation

protocol_notes: Recommends HGH Fragment 176-191 or AOD-9604 for athletes at low body fat seeking precise lipolytic effects without metabolic disruption or anhedonia. Notes GLP-1 agonists modulate dopaminergic reward pathways and can cause anhedonia. Tesamorelin cited as gold standard for abdominal fat loss without emotional/psychological dulling.
